name: Deepgram
one_liner: Deepgram provides a real-time voice AI API platform offering speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and voice agent capabilities for developers and enterprises.
key_products: Flux / Flux Multilingual (conversational speech recognition model)

low_confidence_fields: headcount.current — Tracxn reports 288 as of March 2026; PitchBook shows 183; GetLatka shows 164 (Dec 2024); used Tracxn most-recent figure but confidence is moderate

funding.total_raised_usd — TechCrunch and Deepgram press release cite '$215M+'; PitchBook shows $246M; CBInsights shows $234M; Tracxn shows $229M; used $215M from official press release as conservative floor
headcount.growth_12mo_pct — no reliable year-ago baseline found across sources
ambiguities: Total funding figures vary across data providers ($215M–$246M); official press release states 'over $215 million' as of January 2026
Series C announced January 13, 2026 by press release; Tracxn records the round date as December 5, 2025 (possibly closing date vs. announcement date)
Andreessen Horowitz listed as investor on Sacra but not confirmed in later official round communications
